title: Personal recipe editor decoupling
summary: planner-bound manual recipe form을 four-context editor shell과 pure primitives로 분리하고 RECIPE_DETAIL fork/edit/delete 진입·복귀·dirty·design authority를 잠근다.
goal: public 원본 불변과 owner-private 권한을 유지하면서 planner-add, standalone create/edit, public fork가 하나의 form primitive를 안전하게 재사용하고 각 context의 identity·navigation·side effect를 섞지 않게 한다.

owners.claude: forbidden by explicit user instruction; do not invoke Claude for authoring, repair, implementation, review, security, design, authority, operations, or closeout
owners.codex: separate sessions for Stage 1 author, internal 1.5 reviewer/repair-final, frontend implementation, security/ownership review, five-axis review, design critic, product-design-authority, Stage 6 re-review and closeout; no session approves its own work

dependencies: recipe-visibility-read-hardening Stage 1 docs merged as PR #1077; runtime implementation remains a #5 implementation predecessor
recipe-snapshot-authority-foundation Stage 1 docs merged as PR #1078
recipebook-diary-port is explicitly not a predecessor and its screens remain untouched
#6 owns recipe persistence/RLS/RPC and #8 snapshot-v2 gate precedes external public-fork/personal-edit activation

external_smokes: capability-off current and immediate-previous deployment exposes no external personal write
public anonymous login return restores same recipe and fork draft action
public source remains unchanged and fork result opens new owner-private detail
other-owner private/deleted/quarantined CTA and editor preload remain non-inferable
MYPAGE and RECIPEBOOK_DETAIL keep existing item-to-detail behavior

verify_commands: pnpm exec vitest run tests/workflow-v2-docs.test.ts tests/omo-automation-spec.test.ts tests/omo-bookkeeping.test.ts tests/omo-doc-gate.test.ts tests/source-of-truth-sync.test.ts
evaluator_commands: separate Codex internal 1.5 review of all five Stage 1 core artifacts plus roadmap and status projections
separate Codex security and ownership review of permission non-disclosure login return image cancel and activation boundaries
separate Codex design critic before Stage 4 implementation
separate Codex screenshot/Figma product-design-authority review before Design Status confirmed
separate Codex Stage 5 and Stage 6 implementation reviews and final closeout review

out_of_scope: Recipe create fork PATCH soft-delete persistence RLS RPC optimistic concurrency and future impact token owned by #6 and #7
personal_recipe_v2 or snapshot-v2 external activation before #8 gate
MYPAGE RECIPEBOOK_DETAIL editing UI or recipebook cover picker upgrade
User-facing recipe history timeline trash restore or public publish UI
New public editor endpoint route query field status or error code
Public recipe mutation or client owner visibility public image path authority
Planner shell Cook Mode Meal Log or YouTube redesign
Browser direct Storage mutation or signed URL durable identity
Production code migration remote database or data write in this Stage 1 docs PR
notes: Roadmap moves to docs while workflow lifecycle stays planned and approval remains not_started until fresh separate Codex internal 1.5, security/ownership and five-axis reviewers approve with zero required findings. This Stage 1 lock embeds the mandatory RECIPE_DETAIL/editor state wireframe and requires later design critic plus 390px/320px screenshot/Figma product-design authority. Stage 1 verify_commands are current docs validators, focused workflow tests, lint, typecheck, audit and diff only. Component/E2E/visual/a11y/exploratory/design evidence is future Stage 4 work. #5 does not own #6 writes or #8 activation; external personal editor behavior remains dark until the approved capability and snapshot-v2 gate.
